__fixture__.name: layout_only_policy_blocked_import
__fixture__.scenario: An imported package references a pane whose provider was authorized by a delegated approval and a provider-issued capability ticket. Fleet policy blocks importing that authority, so the pane reopens as a placeholder with a revoked-permission dependency. The approval ticket is named as an intentional exclusion and never serialized as authoritative truth.
doc_sections: UI/UX Spec 6.14 Workspace serialization, portable-state packages, and restore provenance
TDD state/schema governance, mixed-version controls, and release-evidence rules

missing_surface_placeholders.notes: Fleet policy blocked importing the delegated authority; the pane reopened as a placeholder and the capability ticket was excluded.

notes: Layout only. A policy-blocked provider import reopened as a placeholder; the delegated approval and provider-issued capability ticket are named exclusions, not serialized authority.
